prompt: COPY OPTIMIZATION. Optimize this founder's raw value statement into a great homepage hero: 'On demand, reproducible, verifiable end-to-end security audits without the lead time.' Context: kolm runs an instant, deterministic, self-serve security audit of the AI a company ships and outputs a signed report the buyer verifies themselves, so enterprise deals clear their security review in days not weeks (vs hiring a pentest/audit firm and waiting weeks for an unverifiable PDF). Keep the power words that matter (on demand, reproducible, verifiable, no lead time / no wait) but make it human and sharp. Decide what to LEAD with: the speed/on-demand (instant vs weeks), the verifiability (buyer checks it themselves), or the situation (every enterprise deal needs an audit). Write 8 optimized hero headline candidates (one line each, ASCII, no em/en dashes, no overclaim that the AI is 'secure'/'safe'), each with a 1-line subhead, then rank them and pick the single best + 2 alternates. Cite 2-3 real 2026 examples of crisp on-demand / no-lead-time / self-serve security or devtools positioning (URLs).
content:
**Best lead: speed/on-demand (instant vs weeks).** It directly contrasts the painful status quo (hiring firms and waiting weeks for a PDF) while naturally incorporating verifiability and reproducibility as the "how" that makes the speed trustworthy and buyer-verifiable. The situation (enterprise deals) is strong context but secondary; lead with the outcome buyers feel immediately.

**8 optimized hero headline candidates** (ASCII only, one line each; subheads are one line):

1. Security audits in minutes, not weeks.  
   Self-serve, reproducible reports buyers verify on their own.

2. Instant on-demand audits with no lead time.  
   Deterministic output, signed and verifiable by the buyer.

3. End-to-end audits on demand, zero wait.  
   Reproducible results the enterprise buyer checks themselves.

4. Skip the audit firm. Get verifiable reports today.  
   On-demand, reproducible, and buyer-verifiable in minutes.

5. Verifiable security audits without the wait.  
   Instant, reproducible, and signed for direct buyer review.

6. On-demand audits that clear deals fast.  
   Reproducible output, fully verifiable by the buyer, no lead time.

7. Audits when you need them, verified by you.  
   Instant, deterministic, reproducible reports with zero wait.

8. No more weeks for security sign-off.  
   On-demand, reproducible audits the buyer verifies instantly.

**Ranking & selection** (criteria: sharpness/human tone, retention of all power words, emphasis on speed as lead, clarity of buyer benefit, no overclaims):  
- **Single best: #1** — "Security audits in minutes, not weeks. Self-serve, reproducible reports buyers verify on their own."  
  Crispest contrast, leads with the felt pain/speed win, keeps every key word, feels human and deal-focused.  

- **Alternate 1: #4** — "Skip the audit firm. Get verifiable reports today. On-demand, reproducible, and buyer-verifiable in minutes."  
  Strong situation + speed combo, very direct.  

- **Alternate 2: #2** — "Instant on-demand audits with no lead time. Deterministic output, signed and verifiable by the buyer."  
  Cleanest retention of "on demand / no lead time," pairs perfectly with verifiability.  

**Real 2026 examples of crisp on-demand / no-lead-time / self-serve security or devtools positioning** (sourced via web search):  
- Qualys FlexScan: “targeted, on-demand cloud security checks instead of waiting for full scheduled scans.”[[1]](https://cloudaware.com/blog/cloud-security-assessment-tools/)  
- Sprinto: “Instant, audit-ready compliance reports.”[[2]](https://sprinto.com/blog/best-cybersecurity-tools/)  
- Skypher / similar trust-center tools (e.g., SafeBase, Conveyor): self-serve security documentation portals that let prospects access reports under automated NDA, reducing inbound volume via instant buyer self-service.[[3]](https://skypher.co/post/best-security-questionnaire-automation-software)

These mirror Kolm’s positioning: instant/self-serve access that removes wait times and hands verification/control to the buyer.
